description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 1 day ago - May 16, 2026 | 💼 Flexible schedule

The company is looking for a proactive BD / Sales Manager to help grow partnerships with Web3 and crypto projects.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Searching for potential clients and partners
- Initial outreach via chats and calls
- Lead communication and follow-ups
- Managing incoming and outgoing contacts
- Reporting and pipeline updates

🔑 Requirements:
- Experience in Sales / Business Development
- Web3 / crypto background is a strong plus
- English B2+
- Strong communication and lead management skills
- Ability to work independently

💡 Perks & Benefits:
- Fixed payment per client
- Bonuses for high-quality leads
- Fully remote work
- Flexible schedule
- Growth opportunity to core team with revised compensation structure

📩 To apply: Send your CV in PM to the poster. DM Valentina Matveeva on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/valentina-matveeva-4958a1271 or reach out via tg @MValay.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/valentina-matveeva-4958a1271_hiring-remotejob-businessdevelopment-share-7461027678356332544-H0iB
